title: Cinematic and Web Funnel Engine — video-asset-ledger.json (Skill 62, U12)
description: P9-FINAL-MEDIA's asset-tracking artifact (CWFE-MANIFEST.json names cost-ledger.json as P9's task-ledger produce_artifact; this ledger is the analogous asset/hash/boundary-frame record P7-STILLS' asset-ledger.json already establishes, extended to final scene clips and connector clips). Two kinds of entries: 'scene_final' -- a scene's own approved-tier clip, generated with two-image first/last frame pinning off that scene's OWN P7-STILLS boundary stills (spec 9.2), then immediately encoded (scripts/encode_scrub_media.py) and boundary-extracted (scripts/extract_boundaries.py) so its REAL encoded first/last frames exist (ADR-9); 'connector' -- a clip bridging two ADJACENT already-final-and-encoded scenes, generated with two-image frame pinning off the actual encoded LAST frame of the preceding scene and the actual encoded FIRST frame of the following scene (spec 12.2, ADR-9 'the next clip or connector starts from the actual final frame extracted from the encoded preceding clip, not from the original still'). Validated on every read/write by scripts/state_engine.py.

asset_id.description: Deterministic: '{scene_id}:final' for kind=scene_final, or '{from_scene_id}->{to_scene_id}:connector' for kind=connector. A producer re-run never creates a second entry for the same asset_id.

scene_id.description: Set for kind=scene_final; null for kind=connector.

from_scene_id.description: Set for kind=connector (the preceding scene); null for kind=scene_final.

to_scene_id.description: Set for kind=connector (the following scene); null for kind=scene_final.

local_path.description: The raw provider-downloaded clip, before encode_scrub_media.py normalization.

input_urls.description: [first frame-pin URL, last frame-pin URL] actually submitted -- order-significant (spec 12.2/ADR-8).

media_processing_receipt_path.description: Path to the full scripts/encode_scrub_media.py media-processing-receipt.json for this asset.

boundary_frames_receipt_path.description: Path to the full scripts/extract_boundaries.py boundary-frames.json for this asset's encoded variant -- REAL encoded frames (ADR-9), never a generated still.
